name: Challenger Gold Limited
analysis: CEL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 32% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.1400, stop A$0.1139, target A$0.1550 (0.57:1) — then trail it.
